exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your personal training forward
items: Complete a comprehensive fitness assessment including measurements, current activity levels, and health history
Research and identify your specific fitness goals using the SMART criteria (Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound)
Research and schedule a consultation with a certified personal trainer or fitness professional
Create a detailed weekly schedule mapping out your available workout times and preferred exercise activities
Research and understand the basic principles of progressive overload and proper exercise form for your chosen activities
Calculate and plan your daily nutritional needs including protein, carbohydrate, and calorie requirements based on your fitness goals
